title: Grimoire · Collision Pattern Selection
description: Extraction schema for collision-pattern-selection.md. Fields map to **Label:** fill-ins, tables, and checkbox groups in the template. Mark fields with x-source-required: true when the value should cite a source passage.

_source_text.description: Metadata about the source text being analyzed (fill in when using this template for book analysis).

what_other_collision_patterns_did_you_co.description: What other collision patterns did you consider?

slot_rows.description: Table with columns: Slot, Role, Circle, Notes
